scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:contract && npm run test:page
scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test lib/__tests__/control-plane-proxy.test.ts lib/__tests__/workspace-context.test.ts lib/__tests__/client-workspace-context.test.ts lib/__tests__/client-workspace-navigation.test.ts lib/__tests__/control-plane-service.test.ts lib/__tests__/handoff-query.test.ts lib/__tests__/billing-providers.test.ts
scripts.test:browser:smoke:dev: PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_COMMAND='npm run dev -- --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3005' PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 playwright test --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.preview: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.preview:staging: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare preview --env staging
scripts.deploy: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.deploy:staging: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:staging:dry-run: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --env staging --dry-run
scripts.upload: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare upload
